2605.25354.title: Context-CoT: Enhancing Context Learning via High-Quality Reasoning Synthesis
2605.25354.paper_summary: While LLMs excel at reasoning over prompts using static pretrained knowledge, they struggle significantly with context learning-the ability to dynamically extract, internalize, and apply new knowledge from complex, task-specific contexts. Recent evaluations on the CL-Bench reveal a critical capability gap: frontier models solve only 17.2% of context-dependent tasks on average.
2605.25354.paper_summary_zh: 雖然大型語言模型在使用靜態預訓練知識進行推理方面表現出色，但它們在上下文學習方面面臨重大挑戰——即從複雜的、特定任務的上下文中動態提取、內化和應用新知識的能力。最近在 CL-Bench 上的評估揭示了一個關鍵的能力差距：前沿模型平均僅能解決 17.2% 的上下文依賴任務。
2605.25354.author: Hongbo Jin et.al.
2605.25354.authors: Hongbo Jin, Mingnan Zhu, Jingqi Tian, Xu Jiang, Zhongjing Du, Haoran Tang, Siyi Xie, Qiaoman Zhang, Jiayu Ding
